description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 22 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 14 mins. His work was split across 3 projects and focused mostly on Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, with smaller amounts of SQL and other languages. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
